parameters.query: WITH body AS (SELECT convert_from(decode($2, 'base64'), 'UTF8')::jsonb AS j), bumped AS (UPDATE apps SET current_version = current_version + 1, updated_at = now(), name = COALESCE((SELECT j->>'name' FROM body), name), status = COALESCE((SELECT j->>'status' FROM body), status) WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING id, current_version), new_ver AS (INSERT INTO app_versions (app_id, version, metadata, steps, blockly_state) SELECT id, current_version, (SELECT j->'metadata' FROM body), (SELECT j->'steps' FROM body), (SELECT j->'blockly_state' FROM body) FROM bumped RETURNING app_id, version) SELECT app_id::text AS id, version FROM new_ver
